SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS RYAN TIBBETTS AND ARIANNA TIBBETTS ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ESSEX IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIBBETTS, RYAN TIBBETTS, ARIANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESSEX PORTFOLIO, L.P. DBA: BENNETT LOFTS INVOICE WAS SUFFICIENT. SEE CC 1950.5(H)(2)(C). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
